content.problemStatement:
While we took a fundamental approach to solving the previous problems, there are methods in java which can help us achieve the same result. \
These will be helpful for commonly found programming problems.
- `Math.sqrt(n)` \
Returns the square root of a number $n$
- `a.gcd(b)` \
Returns the greatest common divisor of two integers $a$ and $b$
- `Math.floor(n)` \
Rounds a number $n$ **down** to the nearest integer
- `Math.ceil(n)` \
Rounds a number $n$ **up** to the nearest integer
- `Math.pow(x,y)` \
Returns the value of $x$ to the power of $y$

**Note:** You have to **import** the package before using these methods. \
Try running the code in the IDE without importing the package to check the error.
